name: Windows RDP Port Modified
description: Detects modifications to the default Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) port on Windows systems. Changing the RDP port is a common technique used by attackers to evade basic detection and firewall rules.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the registry value set event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Registry Value Set Event ID (13).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that modified the registry key.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the process that modified the registry key.

parameters.name: target_object
parameters.description: The target registry key path, specifically 'SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server\WinStations\RDP-Tcp\PortNumber'.

parameters.name: details
parameters.description: The new value set for the PortNumber (the new RDP port).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that initiated the registry modification.
